subcodes.first_line: O Firuz! Hearken thou unto the Call of the All-Merciful on this Naw-Rúz wherewith all things have been adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا فیروز ان استمع ندآء الرحمن فی هذا النیروز الذی به تزینت الاشیاء کلها
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @personal instructions
